items.title: Minial Laborer
items.description: Work with a back breaking or mind numbing job to survive

items.title: Street Urchin
items.description: Raised on the streets, surviving through wit, theft, and instinct

items.title: Criminal Underworld
items.description: Connected to gangs, organized crime, or illegal operations

items.title: Homeless Drifter
items.description: Living without stable shelter, moving from place to place

items.title: Working Class Laborer
items.description: Blue-collar worker with practical skills and endurance

items.title: Soldier / Veteran
items.description: Trained in combat, shaped by war or military service

items.title: Law Enforcement
items.description: Background in policing, investigation, or security

items.title: Investigator
items.description: Skilled in uncovering secrets and solving mysteries

items.title: Academic Scholar
items.description: Educated in universities, focused on knowledge and research

items.title: Scientist
items.description: Engaged in research, experimentation, or technical innovation

items.title: Medical Professional
items.description: Trained in medicine, anatomy, and healthcare

items.title: Legal Professional
items.description: Experienced in law, courts, and legal manipulation

items.title: Politician
items.description: Operates within systems of governance and public influence

items.title: Aristocrat
items.description: Born into wealth, status, and social privilege

items.title: Entrepreneur
items.description: Built wealth through business ventures and risk-taking

items.title: Celebrity
items.description: Public figure with fame and social visibility

items.title: Artist
items.description: Creative individual expressing through art, music, or performance

items.title: Journalist
items.description: Seeker of truth, working in media or reporting

items.title: Hacker
items.description: Technically skilled in computers, networks, and digital intrusion

items.title: Cult Member
items.description: Part of a secretive or esoteric belief group

items.title: Religious Clergy
items.description: Raised or working within organized religion

items.title: Occultist
items.description: Student or practitioner of hidden and forbidden knowledge

items.title: Conspiracy Insider
items.description: Aware of hidden truths behind society or the supernatural

items.title: Trauma Survivor
items.description: Endured catastrophic events that shaped resilience

items.title: Test Subject
items.description: Used in scientific or supernatural experimentation

items.title: Ex-Convict
items.description: Formerly imprisoned, shaped by incarceration

items.title: Nomad
items.description: Lives a transient lifestyle, never settling in one place

items.title: Immigrant
items.description: Relocated from another country, navigating new culture

items.title: Refugee
items.description: Fled conflict or disaster, often with little left

items.title: Orphan
items.description: Grew up without parental support

items.title: Family Business
items.description: Raised within a family trade or enterprise

items.title: Corporate Professional
items.description: Worked within large organizations or corporations

items.title: Fixer
items.description: Middleman who connects people, deals, and opportunities

items.title: Smuggler
items.description: Specializes in moving illegal goods or people

items.title: Mercenary
items.description: Sells combat skills to the highest bidder

items.title: Activist
items.description: Driven by ideology to enact social or political change
